message:
feat: Enhanced logging with multiple output formats

Extend logging system with flexible format and destination options:

- LogFormat enum: Human (default), Json, Compact
- Environment variable configuration: CAUT_LOG, CAUT_LOG_FORMAT, CAUT_LOG_FILE
- File logging support for persistent log capture
- Utility functions for parsing env vars
- Test helpers for log capture and assertions

This enables:
- JSON logging for machine parsing (CI, log aggregation)
- Compact logging for minimal output
- File logging for debugging sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -769,6 +769,7 @@ pretty = true
             log_level: None,
             json_output: false,
             verbose: false,
+            debug_rich: false,
         }
     }
